svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_ComponentDiagram

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam componentStyle uml2
skinparam componentBackgroundColor #E8F4FD
skinparam componentBorderColor #1E88E5
skinparam packageBackgroundColor #FAFAFA
skinparam packageBorderColor #666666
skinparam arrowColor #333333

title Online Movie Ticket Booking Platform - Component Diagram

' ===== PRESENTATION LAYER =====
package \"Presentation Layer\" as PL #E3F2FD {
 [MovieController] as MC
 [BookingController] as BC
 [ShowController] as SC

 note right of MC : REST APIs for\nmovie search
 note right of BC : REST APIs for\nbooking operations
}

' ===== SERVICE LAYER =====
package \"Service Layer\" as SL #E8F5E9 {
 interface \"MovieService\" as MS
 interface \"BookingService\" as BS

 [MovieServiceImpl] as MSI
 [BookingServiceImpl] as BSI
 [EntityMapper] as EM

 MS <|.. MSI
 BS <|.. BSI

 note bottom of MSI : READ Scenario\n- Search movies\n- Get shows\n- Seat availability
 note bottom of BSI : WRITE Scenario\n- Create booking\n- Confirm/Cancel\n- Concurrency handling
}

' ===== REPOSITORY LAYER =====
package \"Repository Layer\" as RL #FFF3E0 {
 [MovieRepository] as MR
 [TheaterRepository] as TR
 [ShowRepository] as SHR
 [ShowSeatRepository] as SSR
 [BookingRepository] as BR
 [UserRepository] as UR
 [PaymentRepository] as PR
 [ScreenRepository] as SCR
 [SeatRepository] as STR
}

' ===== DATABASE LAYER =====
database \"Database\" as DB #FFEBEE {
 [H2 / MySQL] as DBE
}

' ===== CONNECTIONS =====
MC --> MS
BC --> BS
SC --> MS

MSI --> MR
MSI --> TR
MSI --> SHR
MSI --> SSR
MSI --> EM

BSI --> BR
BSI --> SHR
BSI --> SSR
BSI --> UR
BSI --> PR
BSI --> EM

MR --> DBE
TR --> DBE
SHR --> DBE
SSR --> DBE
BR --> DBE
UR --> DBE
PR --> DBE
SCR --> DBE
STR --> DBE

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-6"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="643" width="2320" x="80" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
